about.heading: Hello, There! 👋🏻
about.description: Hi, I'm Ankur Soni — a passionate Full Stack Web Developer from India. I specialize in building responsive, user-friendly, and scalable web applications using technologies like React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Currently, I'm pursuing a full-time web development course at Masai School, where I’ve gained hands-on experience in JavaScript, Data Structures & Algorithms, and real-world project building through collaborative hackathons. I love solving problems and continuously improving my skills. When I’m not coding, I enjoy exploring new tools, writing about my learning journey on LinkedIn, and helping others in the tech  community.

work.heading: Projects
work.description: A collection of my full-stack and AI-powered projects showcasing modern web development and real-world problem solving.

desc: Developed a responsive business website  using React and Tailwind CSS.
Designed modern UI components optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
Implemented reusable components and deployed the application on Netlify.
Enhanced user experience by optimizing layout, improving loading performance, and ensuring smooth navigation across all devices.
Developed backend APIs for user authentication including login and registration using JWT.
Implemented task management features such as task creation, assignment, and status tracking.
Added collaboration features like comments, tagging, and due date notifications for productivity.
Built a full-stack AI-powered product discovery platform with natural language search functionality.
Integrated OpenAI API to analyze user queries and return relevant products with AI-generated summaries.
Developed RESTful APIs for product listing, filtering, and AI-based search using Node.js and Express.
Built a modern weather application with real-time data using React and TypeScript.
Implemented global state management using Redux Toolkit for efficient data handling.
Designed a clean and responsive UI with Tailwind CSS for all devices.
Integrated API to fetch live weather data and display dynamic results.
